stages.concept:
# Unit 122: 동사구의 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동사구의 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 동사구(동사 + 전치사/부사)는 **하나의 동사처럼** 취급해서 수동태를 만들어요. 전치사/부사를 떼어놓으면 안 돼요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **look after (돌보다)**:

> She **looks after** the baby. (능동)
> → The baby **is looked after** by her. (수동)
> 아기가 그녀에 의해 돌봄을 받는다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **take care of (돌보다)**:

> He **takes care of** his grandmother. (능동)
> → His grandmother **is taken care of** by him. (수동)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **laugh at (비웃다)**:

> They **laughed at** him. (능동)
> → He **was laughed at** by them. (수동)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **turn off (끄다)**:

> She **turned off** the light. (능동)
> → The light **was turned off** by her. (수동)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **put off (연기하다)**:

> They **put off** the meeting. (능동)
> → The meeting **was put off** by them. (수동)

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"The math problem was figured (       ) by her." (그 수학 문제는 그녀에 의해 풀렸다.)
1. into
2. at
3. out ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 'figure out(~을 알아내다, 풀다)'이라는 동사구가 수동태로 쓰인 것이므로, be동사 + p.p.
형태 뒤에 부사 out이 빠짐없이 와야 합니다. 동사구는 언제나 한 덩어리처럼 움직여야 해요!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 동사구는 통째로 수동태로! 전치사/부사를 빼먹으면 안 되는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 122: 동사구의 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
A cat looks for a mouse.
→ A mouse is (     ) by a cat.
> **정답** looked for

---

**02.** They laughed at him.
→ He was (     ) by them.
> **정답** laughed at

---

**03.** She takes care of the baby.
→ The baby is (     ) by her.
> **정답** taken care of

---

**04.** We turned off the light.
→ The light was (     ) by us.
> **정답** turned off

---

**05.** They put off the meeting.
→ The meeting was (     ) by them.
> **정답** put off

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He was laughed by everyone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** laughed → laughed at

---

**07.** The baby is taken care by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** care → care of

---

**08.** The light was turned by him.
(불을 끄다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** turned → turned off

---

**09.** He was looked by the police.
(경찰에 의해 찾아지고 있다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** looked → looked for

---

**10.** The meeting was put by them.
(연기되다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** put → put off

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 모두에게 비웃음을 당했다.
He was everyone.
> **정답** laughed at by

---

**12.** 아기는 그녀에 의해 돌봐진다.
The baby is her.
> **정답** taken care of by

---

**13.** 불이 꺼졌다.
The light was .
> **정답** turned off

---

**14.** 회의가 연기되었다.
The meeting was .
> **정답** put off

---

**15.** 그 범인은 경찰에 의해 수색되고 있다.
The criminal is the police.
> **정답** looked for by

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 친구들에게 비웃음을 당했다.
was He laughed at by his friends
> **정답** He / was / laughed / at / by / his / friends

---

**17.** 아기는 할머니에 의해 돌봐진다.
The baby taken is care of by grandma
> **정답** The / baby / is / taken / care / of / by / grandma

---

**18.** 불이 그에 의해 꺼졌다.
The light turned was off by him
> **정답** The / light / was / turned / off / by / him

---

**19.** 시험이 다음 주로 연기되었다.
The test put was off to next week
> **정답** The / test / was / put / off / to / next / week

---

**20.** 그 고양이는 주인에 의해 찾아졌다.
The cat looked was for by its owner
> **정답** The / cat / was / looked / for / by / its / owner
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 122: 동사구의 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
They believe that math is one of the most important
subjects.
→ It __________ math is one of the most important
subjects.
is believed by
is believed that
was believed that
believed
was believed by
> **정답** is believed that

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
People think that junk food is not good for the body.
→ It __________ junk food is not good for the body.
is thought that
is thought by
was thought by
thought
was thought that
> **정답** is thought that

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
People expect that the rainy season begins soon.
→ The rainy season __________ begin soon.
expected
is expected that
is expected
is expected to
is expected by
> **정답** is expected to

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
They reported that the police caught the thief.
→ The police __________ catch the thief.
is reported by
reported
is reported to
was reported by
was reported to
> **정답** is reported to

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. [2개]
They think that the writer is famous.
It is thought to the writer is famous.
The writer is thought to be famous.
The writer thought that be famous.
It is thought that the writer is famous.
The writer is thought that be famous.
> **정답** It is thought that the writer is famous., The writer is thought to be famous.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. [2개]
People say that the festival is held.
The festival said that be held.
The festival is said that be held.
It is said to the festival is held.
The festival is said to be held.
It is said that the festival is held.
> **정답** It is said that the festival is held., The festival is said to be held.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It is said to the boy is a student.
They are cared for by their parents.
The earth is believed that is round.
This box is filled with dolls.
The dog is thought to be smart.
> **정답** It is said to the boy is a student., The earth is believed that is round.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It is believed that a dog barks at a stranger.
People is think to the air is essential.
Chocolate is believed to made of cacao.
This summer is thought to be very hot.
The balloon was blow into the sky by them.
> **정답** It is believed that a dog barks at a stranger., This summer is thought to be very hot.

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
사람들은 그 노래가 매우 아름답다고 말한다.
It __________ the song is very beautiful.
is said that
is said to
is said by
was said that
was said to
> **정답** is said that

---

**10.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
그들은 재활용이 중요하다고 생각한다.
Recycling __________ important.
is thought to is
is thought to be
is thought that is
is thought that be
is thought by
> **정답** is thought to be

---

**11.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
순서대로 고르시오.
사람들은 채소가 몸에 좋다고 여긴다.
It __________ vegetables are good for health.
Vegetables __________ be good for health.
was considered to - is considered that
is considered to - are considered that
is considered by - is considered by
is considered that - are considered to
was considered that - was considered to
> **정답** is considered that - are considered to

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
순서대로 고르시오.
사람들은 그 소문이 사실이라고 믿는다.
It __________ the rumor is true.
The rumor __________ be true.
is believed to - is believed that
believed that - believed to
was believed to - was believed that
is believed that - is believed to
was believed to - is believed that
> **정답** is believed that - is believed to

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어두운 곳에서 책을 보는 것은 눈을 나쁘게 한다고 여겨진다.
Reading books in the dark is thought to make
the eyes bad.
Reading books in the dark is thought make
the eyes bad.
It is thought reading books in the dark makes
the eyes bad.
Reading books in the dark is thought that
make the eyes bad.
It is thought to reading books in the dark
make the eyes bad.
> **정답** Reading books in the dark is thought to make the eyes bad.

---

**14.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그는 무죄라고 추정된다.
It is supposed him innocent.
He is supposed to be innocent.
He is supposed to innocent.
It is supposed that he is innocent.
He is supposed by innocent.
> **정답** It is supposed that he is innocent., He is supposed to be innocent.

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
우리 팀이 축구경기에서 우승했다고 보도되었다.
It was reported that our team won the football
game.
Our team was reported to won the football
game.
Our team was reported to win the football
game.
It was reported our team win the football
game.
Our team was reported by win the football
game.
> **정답** It was reported that our team won the football game., Our team was reported to win the football game.

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
순서대로 고르시오.
그들은 외계인이 존재한다고 믿는다.
It __________ aliens exist.
Aliens __________ exist.
is believed to - are believed that
is believed to - is believed that
is believed that - are believed to
are believed to - are believed to
is believed that - is believed to
> **정답** is believed that - are believed to

---

**17.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
King Sejong made many great achievements.
Hangul is considered that be one of his greatest
achievements. It is said that the illiteracy rate in
Korea is significantly lower because of that.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** is, considered, that, is, considered, to

---

**18.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
It estimates that the whole world will suffer from
food shortages.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** estimates, is, estimated

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
She is supposed that be the richest person in the
world.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** that, to

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
That is believed that wildlife should be protected.
틀린곳 → 정답
> **정답** that, It
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 122 동사구의 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
Jamie took off his coat.
His coat  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• take off ~을 벗다
정답 was, taken, off, by, Jamie

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
They referred to his advice.
His advice  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• refer to ~을 언급하다
정답 was, referred, to, by, them

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The audience paid attention to the performer.
The performer  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
• pay attention to ~에 집중하다
정답 was, paid, attention, to, by, the, audience

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 실험은 그녀에 의해 수행될 것이다.
힌트 (     ) will, carry out
The experiment  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by
her.
• carry out 실행하다
정답 will, be, carried, out

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 마케팅 행사가 판매자들에 의해 활용되었다.
힌트 (     ) take advantage of
The marketing event  (     )   (     )   (     )  
by sellers.
• take advantage of ~를 활용하다
정답 was, taken, advantage, of

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
고장난 컴퓨터가 그에 의해 버려졌다.
힌트 (     ) throw away
A broken computer  (     )   (     )   (     )  by him.
• throw away (쓰레기등을) 버리다
정답 was, thrown, away

---

**07.** 괄호 안의 동사구를 이용하여 대화문을 완성하시오.
A: I heard Kelly's mom went on a business trip. Who
takes care of Kelly now?
B: Kelly  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by her
grandparents. [take care of]
• take care of ~를 돌보다
정답 is, taken, care, of

---

**08.** 괄호 안의 동사구를 이용하여 대화문을 완성하시오.
A: Do you know when we hand in the report?
B: The report should  (     )   (     )   (     )  by
tomorrow. [hand in]
• hand in 제출하다
정답 be, handed, in

---

**09.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
The agent will call for the party.
→ The party  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by the
agent.
• call for ~을 요구하다
정답 will, be, called, for

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
The rabbit was taking a nap. Suddenly the rabbit felt
someone watching him. The rabbit [look around]
. A lion was staring at the rabbit. A lion started to]
chase the rabbit. The rabbit [run after] (     )  by a
lion. The rabbit barely ran away.]
정답 looked around, was run after

---

# Unit 122: 동사구의 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
They believe that reading is one of the most useful habits.
→ It __________ reading is one of the most useful habits.
is believed by is believed that was believed that believed was believed by
> 정답: is believed that

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
People think that fast food is not good for health.
→ It __________ fast food is not good for health. is thought that is thought by was thought by thought was thought that
> 정답: is thought that

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
People expect that the cold weather ends soon.
→ The cold weather __________ end soon. expected is expected that is expected is expected to is expected by
> 정답: is expected to

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
They reported that the ranger found the lost hiker.
→ The ranger __________ find the lost hiker. is reported by reported is reported to was reported by was reported to
> 정답: is reported to

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. [2개]
They think that the author is talented.
It is thought to the author is talented.
The author is thought to be talented.
The author thought that be talented.
It is thought that the author is talented.
The author is thought that be talented.
> 정답: It is thought that the author is talented., The author is thought to be talented.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. [2개]
People say that the concert is canceled.
The concert said that be canceled.
The concert is said that be canceled.
It is said to the concert is canceled.
The concert is said to be canceled.
It is said that the concert is canceled.
> 정답: It is said that the concert is canceled., The concert is said

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It is said to the girl is a dancer.
They are looked after by their grandparents.
The moon is believed that is smaller than the earth.
This jar is filled with candy.
The cat is thought to be lazy.
> 정답: It is said to the girl is a dancer., The moon is believed that is round.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It is believed that exercise keeps us healthy.
People is think to water is necessary.
Bread is believed to made of flour.
This winter is thought to be very cold.
The kite was blow into the sky by them.
> 정답: It is believed that exercise keeps us healthy., This

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
사람들은 그 그림이 매우 가치있다고 말한다.
It __________ the painting is very valuable.
is said that is said to is said by was said that was said to
> 정답: is said that

---

**10.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그들은 운동이 중요하다고 생각한다.
Exercise __________ important.
is thought to is is thought to be is thought that is is thought that be is thought by
> 정답: is thought to be

---

**11.** 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 순서대로 고르시오.
사람들은 과일이 몸에 좋다고 여긴다.
It __________ fruit is good for health.
Fruit __________ be good for health.
was considered to - is considered that is considered to - are considered that is considered by - is considered by is considered that - is considered to was considered that - was considered to
